operations.name: getUser
operations.description: Fetch a user's full profile by ID. Use when you have a userId and need name, email, or status. Prefer this over listUsers when the ID is already known.

operations.name: createUser
operations.description: Create a new user account. Use during onboarding or when provisioning an account on behalf of another service. Returns the created user including the assigned ID.

events.name: userCreated
events.description: Emitted after a new user is successfully persisted. React to this to trigger welcome emails, audit logs, or downstream provisioning.

subscriptions.name: watchUser
subscriptions.description: Stream live updates for a specific user. Use when you need to react to profile or status changes in real time rather than polling getUser on an interval.
